airplane: A sleek aircraft with swept-back wings and a cylindrical fuselage soaring through the sky.

An airplane photographed from below showing its flat underside, wing tips, and twin tail stabilizers.

A car with rounded fenders, a visible grille at the front, headlights, and rubber tires on the road.
An automobile with a compact body shape, side mirrors, door handles, and a rear trunk.
A passenger car with a low profile, curved roofline, and rectangular license plate area.
A motor vehicle with a streamlined hood, wheel wells, and a distinct front-to-rear body contour.
bird: A small feathered animal with a pointed beak, rounded body, and thin legs perched on a branch.
A bird with colorful plumage, spread wings showing individual flight feathers, and a fan-shaped tail.
A songbird with a compact body covered in soft feathers, bright eyes, and small clawed feet.
A perching bird with a distinctive breast pattern, short curved beak, and layered wing feathers.
A wild bird in natural habitat showing its characteristic head crest, eye stripe, and tail shape.

A feline with soft fur, a flexible body, retractable claws, and a long curving tail.
A house cat with triangular ears, a pink nose, and distinctive facial markings around its eyes.
A small cat with padded paws, a sleek coat pattern, and alert upright ears scanning its surroundings.
A domestic cat showing its characteristic rounded head, almond-shaped eyes, and graceful seated posture.

A wild deer with a tawny brown coat, white belly patch, and branching antlers atop its head.
A cervid with an elongated neck, large oval ears, and a compact muscular body built for leaping.
A deer standing alert in a natural setting with its characteristic spotted or solid brown fur coat.
A forest animal with hooved feet, a short muzzle, and a distinctive white rump patch visible from behind.
dog: A domestic dog with a wet nose, floppy or pointed ears, and an expressive face with visible teeth.
A canine with a muscular body, wagging tail, and a thick or short coat of fur in various colors.
A pet dog with bright attentive eyes, a panting tongue, and four sturdy legs with padded paws.
A dog breed showing its distinctive muzzle shape, ear set, and characteristic body proportions.
A loyal dog with a collar around its neck, a broad chest, and a tail held high or curled.

A frog with a wide flat head, no visible neck, and webbed toes on its splayed feet.
An amphibian with a compact rounded body, large circular eardrums behind its eyes, and a pale belly.
A tree frog clinging to a surface with sticky toe pads, showing its vibrant green or brown coloring.
A frog in a crouching position with its characteristic hunched back and large protruding eyes.

An equine with a broad chest, arched neck, and a long tail of coarse hair sweeping behind it.
A horse showing its distinctive elongated face, flared nostrils, and large expressive dark eyes.
A saddled or bridled horse with a sleek coat that shines in the light, standing in a field.
A powerful horse with well-defined leg muscles, a deep barrel chest, and erect pointed ears.
ship: A large vessel floating on water with a tall hull, deck structures, and a prominent bow cutting through waves.
A cargo ship with stacked containers on deck, a bridge tower at the stern, and a waterline visible on the hull.
A naval vessel or boat on the ocean with masts, rigging, or radar equipment visible on its superstructure.
A ship sailing on open water with its wake trailing behind, smokestacks, and navigation lights.
A watercraft with a pointed prow, flat deck, and visible portholes or windows along its side.

A freight truck on a highway with its cab-over-engine design, side mirrors, and reflective safety markings.
